headline: Nasdaq Rings Opening Bell at the White House to Mark America 250 and the First Trading Day for Trump Accounts
summary: NEW YORK, July 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq today rang the opening bell live from the White House, marking the celebration of 250 years of American independence — and the first trading day for Trump Accounts, a new initiative that expands access to long-term investing for American children. The White House ceremony brought together leaders from Nasdaq and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) alongside President Trump and senior government officials. headline: President Trump rings the NYSE and Nasdaq opening bells to celebrate Trump Accounts
summary: Watch President Trump ring the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq.

headline: Trump plugs Dell at first-ever White House opening bell, sending shares soaring
summary: Trump rang the bell in the Oval Office to open Monday's trading as he launched investment accounts for babies born from 2025 through 2028.
